tesla.notes: On sale new in Thailand via tesla.com Thai site. Variants as of 2026: Standard (new base, ~THB 1.149M, launched Jan 2026), RWD, Long Range AWD, Performance AWD (up to ~THB 2.199M).

On sale new in Thailand. Variants: RWD and Long Range AWD (~THB 1.719M-2.019M); Tesla has also debuted the extended-wheelbase 6-seat Model Y L in Thailand. English page: https://www.tesla.com/en_th/modely. Model S, Model X and Cybertruck are NOT sold new via Tesla Thailand.

benz.popularity_reason: Best-selling Mercedes SUV in Thailand; locally assembled at Samut Prakan, and the PHEV GLC 350e hits Thailand's plug-in tax sweet spot, making it the volume leader of the lineup.
Historically Mercedes-Benz Thailand's top-selling model line; executive-saloon staple, locally assembled (W214 E 220 d / plug-in hybrids), strong corporate and chauffeur demand.
Entry point to the locally assembled saloon range (W206 built in Samut Prakan); traditional volume model for first-time luxury buyers in Thailand.

Mercedes-Benz Thailand's flagship EV and its BEV volume leader — the EQS 450+ AMG is CKD-assembled in Thailand with BOI EV incentives; Bangkok Post reported a record year for Mercedes BEVs in Thailand.
Segment-dominant luxury flagship in Thailand (locally assembled S 350 d / S 580 e PHEV); consistently the best-seller in the full-size luxury saloon class.

model.generation: 2nd-gen facelift "Highland" (TH launch of Highland ~2024; Model 3 first sold officially in TH 2022); MY2026 refresh lineup announced in Thailand Jan 2026, revised again ~June 2026 (Premium LR AWD dropped)

variants.name: Standard RWD
variants.specNotes: 57.5 kWh LFP · 534 km WLTP (one source says 520) · 0-100 6.2s · simplified interior, 7 speakers · CBU China

variants.name: Premium RWD
variants.specNotes: 57.5 kWh LFP · 534 km WLTP · 0-100 6.1s

variants.name: Premium Long Range RWD
variants.specNotes: 750 km WLTP · 0-100 5.2s · battery reported 75 kWh NMC (headlightmag) vs 84.7 kWh (autolifethailand) — conflict, unverified · power 347 PS (headlightmag) vs 320 hp (autolifethailand)

variants.name: Performance AWD
variants.specNotes: 571 km WLTP · 0-100 3.1s · power reported 510 PS/375 kW (headlightmag) vs 460 hp (autolifethailand/autospinn) — conflict · battery 75-79 kWh NMC reported inconsistently

unknowns: Official site tesla.com/th_TH/model3 and /design configurator returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool — prices could NOT be confirmed directly on tesla.com; the THB prices given are Tesla's official list prices as reported consistently by multiple Thai automotive press (headlightmag, autolifethailand, autospinn, car250, Jan–Jun 2026), not aggregator/dealer prices

Premium Long Range AWD (1,799,000 THB, 441-498 PS, 715 km WLTP) was in the Jan 2026 lineup but reported discontinued by ~June 2026 (autolifethailand); could not confirm on official site whether it is still orderable
Exact battery capacities conflict across sources (57.5 LFP for Standard/Premium agreed; LR/Performance reported 75 / 79 / 84.7 kWh) — Tesla does not publish official kWh
Power figures for LR RWD and Performance conflict between sources (347 vs 320 PS; 510 vs 460 PS)
Standard RWD range reported as 534 km (most sources) vs 520 km (autolifethailand) WLTP
Exact Thai launch year of original Model 3 (official Tesla Thailand entry Dec 2022) and Highland arrival not verified from official source

checks.note: Listed as Model 3 Standard RWD 1,149,000 THB — exact match
Listed as Model 3 Premium RWD 1,439,000 THB — exact match
Listed as 1,599,000 THB — exact match
Listed as Premium Performance AWD 2,099,000 THB — exact match. Source also lists a discontinued Premium Long Range AWD at 1,799,000 THB not in the checked list (consistent, since it was cancelled).

model.bodyType: SUV (5-door crossover; Model Y L = long-wheelbase 6-seat)
model.generation: 2nd-gen facelift "Juniper" (MY2026, launched Thailand 17 Jan 2026; Model Y L deliveries from Q2 2026); marketed in TH as "Model Y Premium"

variants.name: Model Y Premium ขับเคลื่อนล้อหลัง (RWD)
variants.specNotes: 466 km WLTP (autolifethailand); configurator shows ~488 km est. with 19-inch wheels; 0-100 5.9s; top speed 201 km/h; DC charge up to 175 kW. Tesla TH does not publish power/battery figures.

variants.name: Model Y Premium ขับเคลื่อนล้อหลังรุ่น Long Range (Long Range RWD)
variants.specNotes: 661 km WLTP (official tesla.com/th_th/modely page); 0-100 5.6s; DC charge up to 250 kW, +267 km in 15 min; kerb 1,901 kg; battery 84.7 kWh per autolifethailand (not stated by Tesla TH).

variants.name: Model Y L Premium ขับเคลื่อนสี่ล้อ (AWD, long wheelbase, 6 seats)
variants.specNotes: Secondary source (headlightmag): 462 PS / 493 Nm, 82 kWh, 681 km WLTP, 0-100 5.0s, wheelbase 3,040 mm, 3-row 6-seat, CBU China. Power/battery not published on Tesla TH site.

unknowns: Tesla Thailand's official site does not publish motor power (PS/kW) or battery kWh for any variant — power/battery figures above are from secondary Thai media (autolifethailand.tv, headlightmag.com), not official
Model Y Long Range AWD (฿2,019,000 at Jan 2026 launch) is NOT listed in the th_TH configurator as of 2026-07-22 — appears discontinued/paused in Thailand, unverified
Exact battery kWh of the base RWD variant
Official WLTP range of base RWD (Tesla TH configurator shows only an ~488 km 'estimated' figure; 466 km WLTP is from media)
Performance variant: no evidence it is sold in Thailand currently

unknowns: Battery kWh and official electric range for GLC 350 e 4MATIC SUV — not published on the official TH overview page or the official MAY26 spec sheet (likely same 31.2 kWh pack as the Coupé, unverified)
Coupé 31.2 kWh / ~120 km WLTP range comes from autolifethailand.tv launch report, not the official mercedes-benz.co.th site
GLC 300 e variants (SUV and Coupé) reported by aggregators (9carthai) are NOT in the official TH configurator as of 2026-07-22 — treated as no longer on sale
Exact Thai launch dates: X254 SUV 2023 and C254 Coupé 2024 are from general knowledge, not re-verified against a primary source this session

Whether the 2026 official pages describing 'the new GLC' (620 L boot, rear-axle steering, AIRMATIC) reflect a facelift within X254 — the official deeplink API tags the model series as X254; spec sheet marked 2026 (MY806+056)
GLC 220 d trim naming: base configurator entry carries no trim suffix; the 'AMG Dynamic' 220 d trims cited by aggregators do not appear in the official configurator

checks.note: No independent source lists 3,490,000 as the LIST price of a base (non-Avantgarde) GLC 220 d. The only 3,490,000 found is a promotional/discount price (Oct 2024) on the GLC 220 d Avantgarde, cut from the 3,720,000 list price. Possible confusion between discount price and a base-variant list price.
No Thai media source found mentioning a MANUFAKTUR-paint variant at 3,550,000 THB. Searches on headlightmag/autolifethailand/autospinn/checkraka returned nothing; unverified.
Confirmed 3,720,000 THB (Thai-assembled, X254) by autolifethailand and also headlightmag (https://www.headlightmag.com/2023-11-20-official-price-mercedes-benz-glc-220d-avantgarde-edit/).

Confirmed 4,180,000 THB by autolifethailand and headlightmag (https://www.headlightmag.com/2023-08-10-official-price-mercedes-benz-glc-350-e-amg-2/). Note: heavy promotional discounts existed later (down to 3,490,000 in May 2026), but the list price matches.
Confirmed 4,340,000 THB by checkraka (MY2024) and dealer listings (benzkenghongthong.com).

Official site currently shows promotional/campaign prices in media (e.g. discounts to 3,285,000–3,590,000 per autolifethailand May 2026) — only the official price-list PDF figures are recorded here

mercedes-benz.co.th blocks server-side fetches; prices were extracted from the official price-list PDF (dated 6 JULY, 2026 folder) via the browser — PDF itself carries no explicit year in the text extracted

checks.note: HeadLight Magazine confirms 3,930,000 THB; Autolifethailand also lists same list price
Confirmed 3,650,000 THB; also https://autolifethailand.tv/official-price-mercedes-benz-e350e-exclusive/
Confirmed 4,080,000 THB (MY2024; earlier Launch Edition was 4,250,000). May 2026 promos discount actual selling prices but list price unchanged

variants.name: C 220 d AMG Line (Night Edition)

variants.name: C 220 d AMG Line
variants.specNotes: 2,880,000 THB confirmed by official schema data + ZigWheels + Autolifethailand (Thai-assembled).

variants.name: C 350 e AMG Dynamic (Night Edition)

variants.specNotes: 3,290,000 THB confirmed by official schema data + ZigWheels + Autolifethailand. Note: official page also carries an additional 'Buy Now / InStock' offer for this name at 2,990,000 THB and 'C 350 e plug-in hybrid (Night Edition)' offers at 2,890,000 / 2,950,000 THB — these look like campaign/stock offers, listed in unknowns.

unknowns: All prices were extracted from schema.org structured data embedded in the official overview page (page HTML fetched 2026-07-22); the visible page UI could not be rendered, so I could not confirm which of the 9 offer entries are the definitive current price list vs campaign cards.

Official page carries extra/conflicting offers: 'C 350 e AMG Dynamic (Night Edition)' also at 2,990,000 THB (marked InStock/Buy Now) and 'C 350 e plug-in hybrid (Night Edition)' at 2,890,000 and 2,950,000 THB — unclear if these are separate stock/campaign variants; official-site search snippet also says 'plug-in hybrid starts at 2,990,000 THB'.
C 350 e battery capacity (widely reported ~25.4 kWh) and electric range (WLTP EAER) NOT verified — official Thai page shows '-' for these fields, so left null.
Drive type (RWD) not explicitly stated on the official page (field shows '-'); RWD is the standard W206 layout but unverified from this source.
Thai launch year of W206 (reported 2022) not verified from an official source.
No official downloadable price-list PDF from mercedes-benz.co.th could be located (only a dealer-hosted 2023 PDF).
Whether a 'C 220 d Avantgarde' trim is still on sale is unverified — ZigWheels mentions it but it does not appear in the official page's offer data.

checks.note: No second source found for a plain 'C 220 d Night Edition' at 2,690,000. Thai media only list C 220 d AMG Line Night Edition at 2,800,000 (autolifethailand.tv, checkraka). The 2,690,000 figure appears only as an Oct 2024 promotional price for C 220 d AMG Line (https://autolifethailand.tv/official-discount-price-mercedes-benz-c220d-amg-line-oct2024/) — possible variant-name/price confusion.
Official price 2,800,000 THB confirmed by Autolifethailand and Checkraka (MY2026, Thai-assembled).
Official price 2,880,000 THB confirmed by Autolifethailand; also referenced by dealer benzkenghongthong.com as 'ราคาเดิม 2,880,000'.

Weak confirmation: 3,190,000 THB appears only as 'ราคาแนะนำ' on a dealer (Benz BKK Vipawadee) Facebook post, not major media. Autolifethailand/HeadLightMag list launch price 3,350,000 (2022) and Checkraka 3,200,000; 3,190,000 is plausibly a later revised list price but lacks an independent media source — treat with caution.
Official price 3,290,000 THB confirmed by HeadLight Magazine, Autolifethailand, and Checkraka.

model.generation: V297 · Thai launch 2022 (EQS 500 4MATIC CKD announced Nov 2022; CKD assembly in Thailand)

variants.name: EQS 500 4MATIC AMG Premium
variants.specNotes: Range 702 km per WLTP. 828 Nm, 0-100 km/h 4.8 s, top speed 210 km/h, DC charge 10-80% ~31 min, AC 11 kW. Official Mercedes-Benz Thailand price list effective 23 Mar 2026 (period 04-03/2569) lists 7,200,000 THB incl. 7% VAT; launched Nov 2022 at 7,900,000 THB and later cut by 700,000 THB. Only EQS Saloon variant on the current official price list.

unknowns: Official mercedes-benz.co.th overview page (https://www.mercedes-benz.co.th/en/passengercars/models/saloon/eqs/overview.html) timed out on fetch, so the variant list was taken from the official Recommended Price List PDF (23 Mar 2026) instead — only EQS 500 4MATIC AMG Premium appears there; the previously sold EQS 450+ AMG Premium is absent and appears discontinued, but discontinuation not explicitly confirmed by Mercedes-Benz TH

Whether the Thai CKD EQS 500 is the pre-facelift or 2024-facelift V297 (facelift has larger 118 kWh battery; Thai specs cite 108.4 kWh, indicating pre-facelift) — not verified on the official TH spec sheet
Battery kWh and 702 km WLTP range are from Thai press coverage of the official launch (HeadlightMag/GrandPrix), not fetched directly from the official mercedes-benz.co.th spec sheet

checks.note: Autolifethailand confirms adjusted official price 7,200,000 THB (CKD), cut 700,000 from the 7,900,000 launch price (headlightmag). Note: later official cuts exist — 6,700,000 THB and 2024-2025 promo prices down to ~4.19M — so 7.2M is the 2023-era list price, not current.

variants.name: S 580 e AMG Premium

variants.drivetrain: not stated on official TH spec sheet
variants.specNotes: ICE 270 kW (367 hp) @5,500-6,100 rpm, 500 Nm; e-motor 110 kW / 480 Nm; system 375 kW (510 hp) / 750 Nm; 0-100 km/h 5.2 s; top speed 250 km/h; tank 67 l; boot 350 l; 20-inch AMG multi-spoke wheels; fuel: hybrid, unleaded 95. Battery capacity and electric range (WLTP/NEDC) are NOT published on the official Thai spec sheet or overview page — left null.

unknowns: Battery capacity (kWh) and electric range for S 580 e: not published anywhere on the official Thai site or the official spec-sheet PDF (global figure ~28.6 kWh / WLTP ~100+ km exists but is NOT Thai-official, so left null)
Drivetrain (RWD vs 4MATIC) not stated on the official Thai spec sheet for either variant

Power discrepancy for S 350 d: overview page widget says 210 kW (286 HP) / 2,925 cc while the official spec-sheet PDF (s-class-spec-sheet-sep-2025.pdf, marked 01-04/2567 MY804) says 230 kW (313 hp) / 2,989 cc — could not resolve which reflects the car currently delivered
Exact Thai launch date/year of the current facelift model year not stated on the official site
Generation code W223/V223 is industry knowledge, not printed on the official Thai pages
Spec sheet PDF is filename-dated Sep 2025 but internally marked 01-04/2567 (2024) — internal date inconsistency

Prices are the figures shown on the official overview page (Series = S 350 d Exclusive 7,050,000 / AMG Line = S 580 e AMG Premium 7,580,000); no separate official price-list PDF with prices was found on mercedes-benz.co.th

checks.note: HeadLight Magazine (official MY2023 price article) lists 7,050,000 THB — matches. Also corroborated by checkraka.com (7,050,000 THB).

HeadLight Magazine lists 7,580,000 THB (MY2023) — matches; checkraka also shows 7,580,000 THB for 2022 and 2024 model years. Minor discrepancy: 9carthai shows earlier launch price 7,190,000 THB (2022-2023), superseded by the MY2023 update.
